# defaultIdsModule

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

CRUD operations for DefaultIdsModule records via app CLI

## Usage

```bash
app default-ids-module list
app default-ids-module get --id <value>
app default-ids-module create --databaseId <value>
app default-ids-module update --id <value> [--databaseId <value>]
app default-ids-module delete --id <value>
```

## Examples

### List all defaultIdsModule records

```bash
app default-ids-module list
```

### Create a defaultIdsModule

```bash
app default-ids-module create --databaseId "value"
```

### Get a defaultIdsModule by id

```bash
app default-ids-module get --id <value>
```
